videos.headline: San José State Spartans vs. Texas Longhorns: Full Highlights
videos.description: San José State Spartans vs. Texas Longhorns: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (San José State Spartans vs. Texas Longhorns: Full Highlights) 2025/09/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: Arch Manning shines as No. 7 Texas smashes San Jose State
videos.description: Manning accounts for five touchdowns, throwing for four as well as for 295 yards and rushing for another as the Longhorns dominate the Spartans, 38-7.

videos.headline: Arch Manning finds Parker Livingstone for 83-yard TD
videos.description: Arch Manning airs one out and Parker Livingstone hauls it in for the 83-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Arch Manning finds Parker Livingstone for 83-yard TD) 2025/09/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jaylon Guilbeau with an interception vs. San José State
videos.description: Jaylon Guilbeau with an interception vs. San José State

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jaylon Guilbeau with an interception vs. San José State) 2025/09/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Arch Manning finds Parker Livingstone for 3-yard TD
videos.description: Arch Manning fires to Parker Livingstone in the end zone for Texas' second touchdown connection of the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Arch Manning finds Parker Livingstone for 3-yard TD) 2025/09/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Arch Manning connects with Jack Endries for 36-yard TD
videos.description: Arch Manning fires one to Jack Endries in the end zone to extend Texas' lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Arch Manning connects with Jack Endries for 36-yard TD) 2025/09/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Arch Manning finds Jack Endries for 16-yard TD
videos.description: Arch Manning connects with Jack Endries in the end zone for his 4th passing touchdown of the half.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Arch Manning finds Jack Endries for 16-yard TD) 2025/09/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Touchdown! Jabari Bates scores vs. Texas
videos.description: Jabari Bates runs for 4-yard rushing touchdown

NCF_One-Play (Mason Shipley kicks 47-yard field goal) 2025/09/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Arch Manning scrambles for a 20-yard TD run
videos.description: Arch Manning escapes the pocket and scores a 20-yard touchdown for his 5th total score of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Arch Manning scrambles for a 20-yard TD run) 2025/09/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Sarkisian, Manning recap No. 7 Texas' performance vs. San Jose State
videos.description: Steve Sarkisian reflects on the Longhorns' performance against the Spartans while QB Arch Manning details the improvements that must be implemented going forward.
